use_cases: Revealing user profile information on hover with 3D animated card transitions
Displaying extended profile details in dashboard or team member interfaces
Creating interactive user cards with smooth GSAP-powered animations
Adding contextual profile popovers in social or collaboration platforms
Enhancing user listing interfaces with hover-activated detail views
ai_summary: ProfilePeek is a 3D-animated hover card component that reveals user profile content with smooth GSAP timeline animations featuring scale, rotation, and position transforms. Uses advanced CSS transforms with rotationX/rotationY for a floating card effect and back.out easing for a polished bounce. Ideal for dashboard interfaces, user lists, or any context where revealing additional profile information on hover adds value without cluttering the UI.
